title: phyllostegia racemosa
intro: Phyllostegia racemosa, also known as Hawaiian lilac or blue shrub, is a flowering shrub native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllostegia racemosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
